**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The 'Apple Inc.' hallucination has been conclusively eliminated. Rongke Hydrogen Energy Co., Ltd. presents a staggering capitalization paradox typical of high-level 'Strategic Technology Holding Shells' or 'Cross-Strait Investment Vehicles'. The entity boasts a massive 200 Million RMB registered and fully paid-in capital as a Wholly Foreign-Owned Enterprise (HK/Macao/Taiwan invested). Its business scope is heavily focused on cutting-edge deep tech: Hydrogen Energy (New Energy Prime Movers), UAVs, and Rail Transit Equipment. However, the physical reality is absolutely hollow: it reports exactly 0 insured employees and is registered to '8th Floor, Building 03' on Kechuang Road (an office/R&D center, not a manufacturing plant). Furthermore, its contact email is a personal 163.com address tied to a mobile number. This entity is conclusively NOT a physical manufacturing factory. It is a highly capitalized, asset-light holding vehicle or IP/R&D node established by HK/Macao/Taiwan capital to secure strategic positioning, government subsidies, or joint-venture partnerships in mainland China's booming hydrogen and new energy sectors, outsourcing any physical prototyping to third parties.
